title: LevelZ RPG Series
description: This datapack makes all the RPG Series items compatible with LevelZ.
body:
# RPG Series + LevelZ

## This datapack makes all the RPG Series items compatible with LevelZ.


<details>
<summary>LevelZ</summary>

- [LibZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/libz)
- [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz)


</details>


<details>
<summary>RPG Series</summary>

- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)
- [Spell Power Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power)
- [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
- [Paladins and Priests](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests)
- [Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
- [Rogues and Warriors](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors)
- [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)


</details>
